info.name: DabApp – Trainer Module (Complete Flow)
info.description:
## DabApp Trainer Module — Complete Step-by-Step Flow

Follow these folders in order. Variables are saved automatically via test scripts.

| Phase | Who |
|---|---|
| 1 · Pre-Setup | Public (no auth) |
| 2 · Login & Register | Trainer |
| 3 · Garage & Bike | Trainer |
| 4 · Equipment | Trainer |
| 5 · Admin Approval | Admin |
| 6 · Post-Approval Setup | Trainer |
| 7 · Book Fixed Course | Client |
| 8 · Book Travel Course | Client |
| 9 · Completion & Review | Trainer + Client |

### Credentials
| Role | Email | Password |
|---|---|---|
| Admin | admin@dabapp.com | YourAdminPassword |
| Trainer | trainer@dabapp.com | YourTrainerPassword |
| Client | client@dabapp.com | YourClientPassword |

### Variables saved automatically
| Variable | Saved by |
|---|---|
| `trainer_token` | Step 2-1 Login |
| `trainer_id` | Step 2-5 Register |
| `garage_id` | Step 3-4 Add bike |
| `equipment_id` | Step 4-2 Select equipment |
| `admin_token` | Step 5-1 Admin login |
| `location_id` | Step 6-1 Add location |
| `gallery_id` | Step 6-3 Add gallery |
| `course_a_id` | Step 6-5 Create fixed course |
| `course_b_id` | Step 6-6 Create travel course |
| `token` | Step 7-1 Client login |
| `booking_a_id` | Step 7-6 Book course A |
| `payment_url_a` | Step 7-6 Book course A |
| `booking_b_id` | Step 8-3 Book course B |
| `payment_url_b` | Step 8-3 Book course B |

item.name: Phase 1 — Pre-Setup (Public, No Auth)
item.description: Call these before anything else to get the IDs you need for registration and course creation.

request.description:
Public. Returns active levels: 1=Beginner, 2=Intermediate, 3=Advanced.

Use these IDs in the registration body (`level_prices[].level_id`).

Public. Returns all specialties (e.g. Coaching, Competition, Off-Road, Street).

Use these IDs in `specialty_ids[]` during registration.

exec: console.log('Equipment types:', list.map(function(e){ return e.id + '=' + e.name; }).join(', '));

request.description:
Public. Returns admin-managed equipment catalog.

Default IDs:
- 1 = Helmet
- 2 = Jacket
- 3 = Knee Protector
- 4 = Back Protector
- 5 = Gloves
- 6 = Boots

Use these IDs in `equipment_type_ids[]` — you can include them **at register (Step 2-5)** OR separately in Phase 4. Both work.
Public. Use city_id when adding a training location (Phase 6, Step 6-1).

item.name: Phase 2 — Trainer: Login & Register
item.description: Login first, then upload photos/certificates, then submit registration. Status starts as `pending` until admin approves.

request.description: Saves `{{trainer_token}}`. Use this token in all trainer requests as: `Authorization: Bearer {{trainer_token}}`.
Upload profile photo. Response returns the file path — copy it into the `photo` field in Step 2-5 (Register).
Upload cover/banner photo. Response returns the file path — copy it into `cover` field in Step 2-5.

Upload a certificate file (PDF, JPG, PNG). Response returns the file path.

Can call multiple times for multiple certificates. Collect all paths into the `certification_files[]` array in Step 2-5.

exec: console.log('trainer_id saved:', id, '| status: pending (wait for admin approval)');

body.raw:
{
  "name":               "Youssef Benali",
  "name_ar":            "يوسف بنعلي",
  "bio":                "Professional motorcycle instructor with 8 years of experience on circuit and road.",
  "bio_ar":             "مدرب دراجات نارية محترف مع 8 سنوات من الخبرة في الحلبة والطريق.",
  "specialty_ids":      [1, 2],
  "experience_years":   8,
  "certifications":     "FIM Level 2, MSF Certified",
  "photo":              "trainers/photos/photo.jpg",
  "cover":              "trainers/covers/cover.jpg",
  "certification_files": [
    "trainers/certs/fim_level2.pdf",
    "trainers/certs/msf_cert.pdf"
  ],
  "level_prices": [
    { "level_id": 1, "price": 150 },
    { "level_id": 2, "price": 220 },
    { "level_id": 3, "price": 350 }
  ],
  "equipment_type_ids": [1, 2, 5, 6]
}

request.description:
Submit trainer profile. Status starts as `pending`.

**Optional fields you can include here (not required — can also be filled after approval):**
- `equipment_type_ids[]` — select gear from catalog (IDs from Step 1-3). If not sent here, do Phase 4 separately.
- `training_bike_ids[]` — only works if bikes are already in garage (not applicable in this flow — done in Phase 3 instead).

**What happens next:**
- Add bikes to garage (Phase 3)
- If you did NOT send `equipment_type_ids` above, select equipment (Phase 4)
- Admin reviews everything and approves (Phase 5)
- After approval: add location, schedule, gallery, and publish courses

**`level_prices`** — list the levels you want to offer with your requested price. Admin can approve or override the price per level.
Verify registration was submitted. Check `status: pending`.

item.name: Phase 3 — Trainer: Garage & Training Bike Setup
item.description:
First check existing garage bikes (Step 3-1). If a suitable bike already exists, skip to Step 3-6 (training info). If not, add a new bike (Steps 3-2 → 3-5).

**Order matters:** PATCH training-info (Step 3-6) BEFORE selecting as training bike (Step 3-7).

item.name: Step 3-1 · GET My Garage (see existing bikes)

exec: console.log('Garage bikes:', list.map(function(b){ return b.id + '=' + (b.title || b.brand_name); }).join(', '));
console.log('garage_id set to first bike:', list[0].id, '| is_training_ready:', list[0].is_training_ready);
console.log('No bikes in garage — run Steps 3-2 to 3-5 to add one');

request.description:
Returns all bikes in the trainer's garage.

Each bike has:
- `id` → use as `garage_id`
- `title` / `brand_name` / `model_name` / `year`
- `is_training_ready` → `true` only if plate_number + insurance_expiry + insurance_covers_training are all set

**If bike exists AND `is_training_ready: true`** → skip to Step 3-7 (Select Training Bike).
**If bike exists BUT `is_training_ready: false`** → go to Step 3-6 first (Add Training Info).
**If no bikes** → run Steps 3-2 through 3-7 to add a new one.
Public. Note the `id` of your brand (e.g. BMW=7, Honda=12). Use it in Step 3-3.
Public. **Replace `7`** with your brand ID from Step 3-2. Note the model `id` you want.
Public. **Replace `1`** with your model ID from Step 3-3. Note the year `id` you want.

item.name: Step 3-5 · POST Add Bike to Garage

exec: pm.test('Bike added to garage', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

request.description:
Use IDs from Steps 3-2 through 3-4.

Saves `{{garage_id}}`.

**Skip this step if you already picked a bike from Step 3-1.**

item.name: Step 3-6 · PATCH Add Training Info ← REQUIRED

request.description:
⚠️ All 3 fields required. Without this the bike has `is_training_ready: false` and Step 3-7 will return 403.

- `plate_number` — vehicle registration number
- `insurance_expiry` — must be a future date
- `insurance_covers_training` — must be true

**Skip if Step 3-1 showed `is_training_ready: true` for your bike.**

Selects the chosen garage bike (`{{garage_id}}`) as a training bike.

- `is_primary: true` → marks this as the main training bike
- Returns 403 if bike has `is_training_ready: false` (run Step 3-6 first)
- Returns 409 if bike was already selected as training bike

item.name: Phase 4 — Trainer: Equipment Selection
item.description:
Select from the admin-managed catalog which equipment you provide to students.

Names and icons are copied automatically from the catalog.

**Skip this phase if you already included `equipment_type_ids` in the register body (Step 2-5).**

exec: console.log('Available equipment:', list.map(function(e){ return e.id + '=' + e.name; }).join(', '));

request.description: Public. Same endpoint as Step 1-3. Verify the IDs you want to select.

item.name: Step 4-2 · POST Select Equipment from Catalog

exec: console.log('equipment_id saved:', items[0].id, '| total selected:', items.length);

request.description:
Send an array of catalog type IDs. Already-selected types are skipped (no duplicates).

Saves `{{equipment_id}}` (the row ID, not the catalog type ID).

**Note:** If you already sent `equipment_type_ids` in register (Step 2-5), this step is optional — run it only to add more items.

item.name: Phase 5 — Admin: Review & Approve
item.description: Admin reviews the trainer's profile (bikes + equipment + certifications) and approves with final prices per level.

exec: console.log('trainer_id set from pending list:', list[0].id);

request.description: Find the trainer registered in Phase 2. Profile includes their bike, equipment and certification files.
Full profile with bikes, equipment, certifications, and requested prices.

item.name: Step 5-4 · POST Approve Trainer + Set Prices

request.description:
Sets trainer `status = approved`. Admin sets the final `approved_price` for each level.

After this, the trainer can:
- Add training locations
- Set weekly schedule
- Add gallery
- Create and publish courses

**To reject instead:** `POST /api/admin/trainers/{{trainer_id}}/reject` with `{"reason": "..."}` body.

item.name: Phase 6 — Trainer: Post-Approval Setup
item.description:
All these require approved trainer status.

Run in order: location → schedule → gallery → courses (with sessions included in one call).

request.description:
Saves `{{location_id}}`. Used when creating a fixed-location course (Course A).

`city_id` — from Step 1-4.

`day_of_week`: 0=Sunday, 1=Monday, 2=Tuesday, 3=Wednesday, 4=Thursday, 5=Friday, 6=Saturday.

Set `is_available: false` for days off. Full 7-day array — send all days.

Upload multiple images in one call. Each image path should be the URL returned by the storage upload.

Saves `{{gallery_id}}`.

item.name: Step 6-5 · POST Create Course A — Fixed Location (can_travel: false)

exec: console.log('course_a_id saved:', id, '| sessions created:', sessions, '| can_travel:', json.data.can_travel);
pm.test('Course A created with sessions', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

body.raw:
{
  "title":             "Beginner Circuit Training",
  "title_ar":          "تدريب المبتدئين في الحلبة",
  "description":       "Master motorcycle fundamentals at Marrakech Circuit. Perfect for first-time riders who want a structured and safe introduction to riding.",
  "description_ar":    "إتقان أساسيات الدراجة النارية في حلبة مراكش. مثالي للراكبين لأول مرة الذين يريدون مقدمة منظمة وآمنة للقيادة.",
  "level_id":          1,
  "hours_per_session": 2,
  "total_sessions":    5,
  "original_price":    150,
  "promo_price":       120,
  "location_id":       {{location_id}},
  "can_travel":        false,
  "sessions": [
    {
      "session_number": 1,
      "title":          "Introduction & Safety",
      "title_ar":       "المقدمة والسلامة",
      "description":    "Bike familiarization, safety gear inspection, and circuit rules briefing.",
      "description_ar": "التعرف على الدراجة وفحص معدات السلامة وإحاطة قواعد الحلبة.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    },
    {
      "session_number": 2,
      "title":          "Balance & Low-Speed Control",
      "title_ar":       "التوازن والتحكم بالسرعات المنخفضة",
      "description":    "Slow-speed maneuvers, figure-8 drills, and cone weaving exercises.",
      "description_ar": "المناورات بالسرعة المنخفضة وتمارين الرقم 8 والتنقل بين المخاريط.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    },
    {
      "session_number": 3,
      "title":          "Cornering Basics",
      "title_ar":       "أساسيات الانعطاف",
      "description":    "Learn the three pillars of cornering: entry point, apex, and exit point.",
      "description_ar": "تعلم ركائز الانعطاف الثلاث: نقطة الدخول والذروة والخروج.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    },
    {
      "session_number": 4,
      "title":          "Braking Techniques",
      "title_ar":       "تقنيات الكبح",
      "description":    "Progressive braking, threshold braking, and emergency stop drills under supervision.",
      "description_ar": "الكبح التدريجي وكبح العتبة وتمارين التوقف الطارئ تحت الإشراف.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    },
    {
      "session_number": 5,
      "title":          "Full Circuit Lap",
      "title_ar":       "جولة كاملة في الحلبة",
      "description":    "Apply everything in a timed full-circuit supervised lap with post-session debrief.",
      "description_ar": "تطبيق كل شيء في جولة كاملة موقوتة في الحلبة تحت الإشراف مع إحاطة ما بعد الجلسة.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Creates the course AND all 5 sessions in one request.

- `can_travel: false` + `location_id` → client comes to the training circuit
- `promo_price` optional — if set, clients pay this lower price
- Sessions are created in the same request (no second API call needed)
- Status starts as `draft` — must publish (Step 6-7) to make visible to clients

Saves `{{course_a_id}}`.

item.name: Step 6-6 · POST Create Course B — Trainer Travels (can_travel: true)

exec: console.log('course_b_id saved:', id, '| sessions created:', sessions, '| price_per_km:', json.data.price_per_km);
pm.test('Course B created with sessions', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

body.raw:
{
  "title":             "Mobile Coaching — Trainer Comes to You",
  "title_ar":          "تدريب متنقل — المدرب يأتي إليك",
  "description":       "Private coaching at your location. I bring all necessary equipment. Total price includes travel based on distance.",
  "description_ar":    "تدريب خاص في موقعك. أحضر جميع المعدات اللازمة. السعر الإجمالي يشمل التنقل بناءً على المسافة.",
  "level_id":          1,
  "hours_per_session": 2,
  "total_sessions":    3,
  "original_price":    200,
  "can_travel":        true,
  "price_per_km":      5,
  "sessions": [
    {
      "session_number": 1,
      "title":          "Assessment & Personalized Plan",
      "title_ar":       "التقييم والخطة الشخصية",
      "description":    "Evaluate your current skill level, riding style, and goals. Design a personalized 3-session training plan.",
      "description_ar": "تقييم مستوى مهارتك الحالي وأسلوب قيادتك وأهدافك. تصميم خطة تدريب شخصية من 3 جلسات.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    },
    {
      "session_number": 2,
      "title":          "Focused Skill Drills",
      "title_ar":       "تمارين المهارات المركزة",
      "description":    "Targeted exercises addressing the specific weak points identified in session 1.",
      "description_ar": "تمارين موجهة تعالج نقاط الضعف المحددة في الجلسة الأولى.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    },
    {
      "session_number": 3,
      "title":          "Progress Review & Next Steps",
      "title_ar":       "مراجعة التقدم والخطوات التالية",
      "description":    "Assess improvement, record progress, and provide a personalized roadmap for continued development.",
      "description_ar": "تقييم التحسن وتسجيل التقدم وتقديم خارطة طريق شخصية للتطوير المستمر.",
      "duration_hours": 2
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Creates the course AND all 3 sessions in one request.

- `can_travel: true` + `price_per_km: 5` → no `location_id` needed — trainer goes to the client
- Total price at booking = `original_price + (km × price_per_km)` (client sees this before booking via Step 8-1)
- No `promo_price` for this course

Saves `{{course_b_id}}`.
`draft` → `published` + `is_active=true`. Course A is now visible to all clients.
Course B (travel) is now visible to clients.

item.name: Phase 7 — Client: Book Fixed Course (Course A)
item.description: Client logs in, browses trainers, previews sessions, and books Course A (fixed price at the circuit).

request.description: Saves `{{token}}`. Use in all client requests as: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`.

item.name: Step 7-2 · GET Browse All Approved Trainers

request.description:
Public. Filter by: `?specialty_id=`, `?level_id=`, `?city_id=`, `?search=`.

Returns approved trainers only.
Full profile: specialties, approved levels + prices, locations, training bikes, equipment, gallery, reviews.

item.name: Step 7-4 · GET Course A Published Sessions (client preview)

request.description: Public. Client reads the 5-session breakdown with full descriptions before deciding to book.
Dates are set automatically (today + 14 days). Returns available time slots.

item.name: Step 7-6 · POST Book Course A (Fixed Price)

exec: console.log('booking_a_id saved:', id, '| price:', data.total_price, '| status:', data.status);
console.log('payment_url_a saved — open in browser to pay');

body.raw:
{
  "course_id":    {{course_a_id}},
  "booking_date": "2026-07-15",
  "start_time":   "09:00",
  "location_id":  {{location_id}},
  "notes":        "Complete beginner — first time on a circuit"
}

request.description:
Saves `{{booking_a_id}}` and `{{payment_url_a}}`.

**Status after booking:** `pending_payment`

Client must open `payment_url_a` in browser to complete payment. After payment webhook fires status becomes `confirmed`.

item.name: Phase 8 — Client: Book Travel Course (Course B)
item.description: Client previews travel price first (km-based), then books. No location_id needed — trainer travels to the client.

request.description:
Public. Shows the total price before the client decides to book.

**Formula:** `total = original_price + (km × price_per_km)`

Example: `200 + (20 × 5) = 300`

Change `km=20` to the actual distance from trainer to client.

item.name: Step 8-2 · GET Course B Published Sessions (client preview)

request.description: Public. Client reads the 3-session breakdown with full descriptions.

item.name: Step 8-3 · POST Book Course B (Travel Price)

exec: console.log('payment_url_b saved — open in browser to pay');

request.description:
No `location_id` needed for travel courses — trainer comes to client.

Saves `{{booking_b_id}}` and `{{payment_url_b}}`.

item.name: Phase 9 — Completion & Review (Course A)
item.description:
After payment for Course A is confirmed:

1. Trainer starts the session
2. Trainer marks it complete
3. Client confirms it happened
4. Client leaves a review

Status flow: `confirmed` → `in_progress` → `awaiting_confirmation` → `completed`

request.description:
Trainer confirms the session has started.

`confirmed` → `in_progress`

Returns 403 if `payment_status != paid` (client hasn't paid yet).

exec: console.log('Booking status:', d.status, '— waiting for client confirmation');

request.description:
Trainer marks the session as done. Client is notified to confirm.

`in_progress` → `awaiting_confirmation`

item.name: Step 9-3 · POST Client: Confirm Session Completion

request.description:
Client confirms the session happened. `can_review` becomes `true`.

`awaiting_confirmation` → `completed`
One review per booking, only after `status=completed`. `rating` must be 1–5.

item.name: ── Admin Panel (Reference) ──
item.description: Admin utility endpoints. Not part of the main flow — use as needed.

item.name: ── Trainer Extras (Reference) ──
item.description: Additional trainer endpoints used after setup.
